_comment: Copy to ~/.config/news-brief/settings.json and edit. Controls DELIVERY only — tone and output language live in profile.md. Onboarding can write this for you.
_delivery_options: lark | email | file  (start with 'file' to test locally, then switch)
_lark_hint: Get yours with: lark-cli contact +get-user --jq '.data.user.open_id'  (needs the Lark bridge: https://github.com/cindyxu1030/lark-agents-bridge; bot scope to send DMs).
_email_hint: SMTP credentials live in ~/.config/news-brief/.env, not here. See TUTORIAL.md.
